ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Actual year of data collection */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is a leap year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "emission_value" REAL /* Value of emissions recorded for the year */,
  "gas_type" TEXT /* Type of greenhouse gas (e.g., CO2, CH4) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector responsible for the emissions (e.g., energy, agriculture) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the emissions (e.g., MtCO2e) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES emission_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the method (e.g., percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_data_sources" (
  "eds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry in this linking table */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_sources_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES emission_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_sources_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_method_id") REFERENCES collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission data record */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (e.g., 1-100) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES emission_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the trend analysis */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the trend analysis */,
  "average_emission" REAL /* Average emission value over the trend years */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource accessed (e.g., report, dataset) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the uploaded dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., emission, climate, energy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the annotation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or note regarding the data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotation was made */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent annotation (for replies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_reply_to FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES emission_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset upload */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_upload_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_id") REFERENCES data_uploads ("upload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., emission trends, climate analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., chart, table, text) */,
  "component_data" TEXT /* Data for the component (e.g., chart data, table data, text content) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_components_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
